blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.3 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 330 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
